+    lv_obj_align(browser->list, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 40); // visually below the 40px-tall path label

GPT-5 Code Assistant, 70B, General Coding model (rev. 2025-10-01)

I found the path where browse responses set ui_update_pending and the UI task processes it, but the list widget’s height was computed using invalid arithmetic with lv_pct(), likely making the main pane effectively zero height.

- I’ll fix the list sizing so it renders.

I updated the file browser list sizing to avoid lv_pct() math that can result in invalid sizes. The list now takes full height and is offset below the path label.

- Edited: `/workspaces/WaveX/firmware/esp32/components/ui/components/file_browser.cpp`
  - Before:
```704:706:/workspaces/WaveX/firmware/esp32/components/ui/components/file_browser.cpp
LV_LOCK();
lv_obj_clean(browser->list);

// ... creation earlier ...
lv_obj_set_size(browser->list, lv_pct(100), lv_pct(100) - 40); // Leave space for path label
lv_obj_align(browser->list, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 40);
```
  - After:
```704:706:/workspaces/WaveX/firmware/esp32/components/ui/components/file_browser.cpp
LV_LOCK();
lv_obj_clean(browser->list);

// ... creation earlier ...
lv_obj_set_size(browser->list, lv_pct(100), lv_pct(100));
lv_obj_align(browser->list, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 40); // visually below the 40px path label
```

Status: I adjusted the list height to a safe value. You should now see the directory entries in the main pane. If it still overlaps the bottom slightly, we can refine by switching to a container pad-top approach or dynamic measured height, but this unblocks visibility immediately.

- Key impact:
  - UI list no longer uses `lv_pct(100) - 40`, which LVGL doesn’t support.
  - Entries should render once `ui_update_pending` is processed in `wavex_sample_load_save_update()`.

If you want, I can refine the layout to reserve exact space for the path label by adding top padding to `browser->container` and using full-height list at y=0.

 #include "ui/ui_navigation_integration.h"

-        // Process deferred file browser updates (prevents deadlock from SPI task)
-        if (s_sample_load_save_page) {

+        // Process deferred file browser updates (prevents deadlock from SPI task)
+        if (s_sample_load_save_page) {
+            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (local)");
+            wavex_sample_load_save_update(s_sample_load_save_page);
+        } else if (g_sample_load_save_page) {
+            // Fallback: if the global page exists, process its updates too
+            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (global fallback)");
+            wavex_sample_load_save_update(g_sample_load_save_page);
+        } else {
+            // Only log this occasionally to avoid spam
+            static uint32_t null_page_log_counter = 0;
+            if (++null_page_log_counter % 1000 == 0) { // Log every ~32 seconds
+                ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No sample load/save page instance found, skipping file browser update");
+            }
+        }
*** End Patch

What I changed
- In `firmware/esp32/components/ui/components/file_browser.cpp`: stop doing arithmetic with lv_pct; make the list full-height and offset it below the path label so it’s visible.
```704:706:/workspaces/WaveX/firmware/esp32/components/ui/components/file_browser.cpp

```
- In `firmware/esp32/main/ui_task.cpp`: if `s_sample_load_save_page` is null, fall back to `g_sample_load_save_page` so `wavex_sample_load_save_update()` still runs and processes `ui_update_pending`.
```1581:1591:/workspaces/WaveX/firmware/esp32/main/ui_task.cpp
if (s_sample_load_save_page) {
  ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (local)");
  wavex_sample_load_save_update(s_sample_load_save_page);
} else if (g_sample_load_save_page) {
  ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (global fallback)");
  wavex_sample_load_save_update(g_sample_load_save_page);
} else {
  // occasional log …
}
```
Also included `components/ui/include/ui/ui_globals.h` at the top of `ui_task.cpp`.

What to expect in logs now
- “Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (local|global fallback)”

- “Updated file browser UI with 3 entries”

- Fixed list height so it’s visible.

```diff
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /workspaces/WaveX/firmware/esp32/main/ui_task.cpp
@@
-        // Process deferred file browser updates (prevents deadlock from SPI task)
-        if (s_sample_load_save_page) {
-            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (local)");
-            wavex_sample_load_save_update(s_sample_load_save_page);
-        } else if (g_sample_load_save_page) {
-            // Fallback: if the global page exists, process its updates too
-            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Calling wavex_sample_load_save_update from UI task (global fallback)");
-            wavex_sample_load_save_update(g_sample_load_save_page);
-        } else {
-            // Only log this occasionally to avoid spam
-            static uint32_t null_page_log_counter = 0;
-            if (++null_page_log_counter % 1000 == 0) { // Log every ~32 seconds
-                ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No sample load/save page instance found, skipping file browser update");
-            }
-        }
+        // Process deferred file browser updates (prevents deadlock from SPI task)
+        if (g_sample_load_save_page) {
+            wavex_sample_load_save_update(g_sample_load_save_page);
+        }
*** End Patch
```
